## Summary

Describe the problem and the implemented behavior.

## Requirement

- Requirement ID:
- Module ID:
- Closes:

## Change Type

- [ ] Feature
- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] Database or metadata change
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Infrastructure

## Verification

- [ ] `scripts/dev/verify.ps1` passes.
- [ ] New or changed behavior has tests.
- [ ] Clean-install behavior was checked.
- [ ] Upgrade behavior was checked when data structures changed.
- [ ] Tenant-isolation and permission effects were reviewed.
- [ ] No credentials, personal data, dumps or runtime files are included.
- [ ] Documentation and migration notes are updated.

## UI Evidence

For visual changes, attach desktop and mobile screenshots and describe keyboard/accessibility checks.

## Database and Operations

Describe migrations, backfills, indexes, external providers, new environment variables, monitoring and recovery behavior. Write `None` when not applicable.
